positive: A vibrant, whimsical illustration of a celestial forest scene. The main subject is a group of bioluminescent, oversized flora and fauna nestled beneath massive, glowing mushrooms. Include stylized constellations etched into the leaves and a clear, stylized moon in the background. The color palette should be deep indigo, teal, sapphire blue, and accented with luminous neon-pink and lime green glow. The style must be highly detailed, clean vector art combined with a sophisticated, modern illustrative aesthetic (like a sophisticated botanical etching meets psychedelic screen printing). Focus on sharp, clean silhouettes and strong backlighting to maximize contrast. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly scalable for apparel printing. No gradients, only flat colors and clear solid lines, but with realistic light sources for the glow effect.
negative: blur, jpeg artifacts, poor quality, watermark, signature, text, logo, cartoonish, sketch, realistic photo, gradient wash, extra fingers, poor anatomy, noise, messy, messy background
